disambiguation_rules.attorney general: Resolved to Department of Justice leadership based on context of DOJ component designation authority

oddities.note: Section contains detailed procedural requirements for state licensing of sports wagering operators, including suitability standards, background check procedures, and disqualification criteria. Structure emphasizes requirements imposed on State regulatory entities rather than federal enactment of new law.
